metadata.description: Comprehensive SEO analysis plugin for Claude Code. 26 sub-skills and 19 sub-agents, plus 9 optional extensions (DataForSEO, Firecrawl, Banana, Ahrefs, SE Ranking, Profound, Bing Webmaster, Unlighthouse, Content Sentinel). v2.2.4 adds a managed cross-platform runtime and safe sitemap discovery, and repairs GSC pagination, Bing endpoints, extension paths, Windows portability, SPA rendering, and JSON-LD extraction.

plugins.name: claude-seo
plugins.description: Comprehensive SEO analysis plugin for Claude Code. 26 sub-skills and 19 sub-agents, plus 9 optional extensions. v2.2.4 adds a managed cross-platform runtime and safe sitemap discovery, and repairs GSC pagination, Bing endpoints, extension paths, Windows portability, SPA rendering, JSON-LD extraction, and DataForSEO permissions.
